name: Kahlua Cheesecake Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C). Lightly grease a 13-inch x 9-inch baking pan.
2. For the Bar Layer: Melt butter and chocolate in a small saucepan over low heat, or microwave them in a bowl on high, stirring every 30 seconds until melted. Set aside to cool.
3. In a separate bowl, mix flour, baking powder, and salt. In a large bowl, beat brown sugar, eggs, powdered instant espresso, and vanilla until blended. Stir in the cooled chocolate mixture. Gradually add the dry ingredients, mixing well.
4. Pour the batter into an even layer over the prepared pan.
5. For the Cheesecake Layer: In a large bowl, beat cream cheese, sugar, and flour with an electric mixer on medium speed until pale and fluffy. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition. Mix in Kahlua or strong coffee, vanilla, and cinnamon. Pour this mixture over the brownie layer and spread evenly.
6. Bake for 20 minutes, or until the top is almost set.
7. Meanwhile, prepare the Sour Cream Layer by mixing sour cream and sugar in a separate bowl.
8. After baking for 20 minutes, carefully remove the pan from the oven and spread the sour cream mixture over the cheesecake layer. Return to the oven and bake for an additional 10 minutes.
9. Allow the bars to cool completely on a wire rack before cutting into portions.
